name: Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the okra into small pieces and fry in bacon grease until tender.
2. Add onions, celery, and green pepper to the frying pan. Cook until softened.
3. Blend in the flour and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is bubbly and thickened.
4. Stir in tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, ground cloves, chili powder, salt, pepper, oregano, thyme, parsley, and water. Simmer for 1 to 2 hours.
5. Add shrimp (or substitute with other seafood) and cook until done.
6. Serve over rice.
